vibe: Warm, artisanal, premium luxury, authentic Portuguese bakery. predominantly wood tones, pastel white, neutral colors, wood textures and LEDs aesthetic.

background.description: Pastel white / Off-white, soft paper-like base

primary.description: Navy blue (Azul Marinho) for luxury accents, CTAs, and thin structural borders

secondary.description: Warm beige / Wood tone for soft backgrounds

accent.description: Wood texture color / LED glow tone for highlights

headings.usage_rules: Use for all H1, H2, H3. Never use bold/black weights for luxury feel, stick to regular/medium.

body.usage_rules: Clean, highly readable geometry to contrast the ornate serif headings.

accents.usage_rules: Use for overlines, small labels, and category tags.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy: p-12, p-16, p-24 for main sections to give breathing room. Asymmetry creates tension and luxury.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Use Mode A (Tetris Grid) for Gallery and About sections. gap-8 to gap-12. Overlap elements slightly to break standard rigid boxes.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Use 1px borders (border-border) to structure sections, referencing the 'Degrau' (step/structure) architectural motif.

navigation.behavior: Sticky top, Z-50. Navigation links must be visible on desktop.

buttons.primary: Solid #0B1D3A background, #FAF9F6 text, rounded-none or rounded-sm, hover:bg-[#0B1D3A]/90 transition-all
buttons.secondary: Transparent background, border border-[#0B1D3A] text-[#0B1D3A], rounded-none or rounded-sm hover:bg-[#0B1D3A]/5 transition-all

cards.style: Flat, 1px subtle border, NO default shadow. On hover: -translate-y-1, subtle shadow-lg, border color darkens.
cards.image_treatment: Images must scale smoothly on hover within hidden overflow container.

forms.style: Minimalist. Use Shadcn components but override borders to be rounded-none. Inputs should have subtle focus rings in Navy Blue.

admin_dashboard.style: Mode B (Control Room Grid). Dense, functional, clear hierarchy. Use Shadcn components for tables and forms. Keep the same font families but smaller sizing.

hero.treatment: Use as a split-screen or large right-aligned image. Overlay max bg-black/20 if text is placed directly over it, or use Navy Blue gradient.

about.alt: Warm wooden cafe interior with chairs and tables
about.treatment: Tall portrait crop (col-span-4 row-span-2) in a bento layout.

menu_highlights.alt: Small Portuguese pies on wooden tray
menu_highlights.title: Assorted Pastries

textures.treatment: Use inside specific feature sections or footer background with white text to bring the Navy Blue luxury accent to life.

animations.hover: Subtle scale up (scale-105) for images, color shifts for buttons.
animations.scroll: Use Framer Motion for fade-in-up (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1) on scroll for text blocks.
animations.marquee: Use an Editorial Ribbon strategy for a banner highlighting values: 'Artisanal • Freshly Baked • Portuguese Tradition • Premium Quality'. Very slow, subtle, using Serif font, Navy text on soft beige background.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure Navy Blue text on Pastel White meets >4.5:1. Button text must be Off-white.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid (e.g., data-testid='nav-menu-link', data-testid='contact-submit-button').

dependencies.lucide-react: For UI icons (menu, close, map-pin, phone, instagram).
dependencies.framer-motion: For elegant page reveals and image load animations.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the public marketing site with Hero, Menu, About, Gallery, Location, Contact pages/sections.
Create an Admin Panel (dashboard) route (e.g., /admin) for managing menu items.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Playfair Display' imported via Google Fonts for headings, and 'Outfit' for body.
Follow the generous spacing philosophy (py-24, gap-12).
Use the exact media URLs provided in this JSON. DO NOT use placeholders.
Ensure the design feels like a high-end, premium artisanal bakery with predominantly pastel white and wood tones, with sharp Navy Blue accents.
Apply 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and form inputs for testing.
Embed a responsive Google Maps iframe in the Location section.
Use Shadcn UI for forms, dialogs, and admin tables, but override styles to be sharp (rounded-none) and border-thin (border-[#0B1D3A]/20).
